programmes.show_description: Work Experience: Jay arranges work experience for himself and Simon at his dad's company, but a mix-up leaves Neil at a newspaper and Will at a garage.
Thirty-year-old Pablo is HIV positive and wants to break the stigma about his condition. Rapper Leon has been attracting the wrong sort of lady. Can Naked Attraction help?
Trans woman Amira finally feels happy in her skin and wants a man who's proud to show her off. Rugby player Andy has a soft centre to share with a woman on romantic nights in.
What do the Goggleboxers make of Britain's Got Talent, Baby Reindeer, Red Eye, Love Triangle, In with a Shout, The Yorkshire Vet and a This Morning feature on bras?
Roll-neck-phobe Lucy returns, and this time men are off the menu. Can Dr Nick cure GP Emma's dating dry patch? And will James's love of 1D send Mark in the direction of the door?
Bevy's Big Murder Mystery Party: Beverly's first murder mystery party takes a surprising turn. And Erica struggles to pick a major.
Cocoon: When Pops falls asleep at the cinema, Adam worries that his grandpa is slowing down. Bev drags Erica into a contract dispute with her cookbook publisher.
Dead on a Rival: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray shows up unexpectedly. And the Dunphys' old neighbour Kenneth, who's now a tech titan, visits.
The One with the Zip Wire: Thrill-seeker Lee plans an extreme wedding for his unadventurous bride Aimee. Will their big day have the wow factor, or will it crash to the ground?
Break the Ice: Four Aussie teams take on four international duos in the epic brick-building bonanza. Whose cool creation can survive smashing through ice?
Brand new series: In the Malaysian island paradise of Langkawi, the celebs brave a bat cave, and a fruit basket leaves a bitter taste. But will a wrong turn seal one team's fate?
(2018) Feel-good British family comedy. Sarah's (Beattie Edmondson) chaotic life gets even more complicated when she inherits a naughty pug from her nan.
Brand new series: Kit wants answers from Inga and Jazz. A revelation derails a double date. Jules and Philip's sibling rivalry revs up. And can Angus win back Jack's friendship?
Brand new series: It's the third Commitment Ceremony. But with dinner party tensions still simmering, emotions erupt cataclysmically as two marriages come to an end.
Brand new series: Friends and Family Week exposes insecurities and deepens divides. And a reminder of her groom's ex sends one bride spiralling.
...for Stand Up To Cancer: Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson make mini rolls, syrup sponge puddings, and iconic outfits in choux.
(2010) Oscar-winning animated sequel with Tom Hanks and Tim Allen. Can Woody save Buzz and co from a nursery run by an embittered teddy bear?
The Joy of Sect: The family join a cult that brainwashes its disciples into believing they will be taken to the planet Blisstonia, but Marge escapes and plans a rescue.
Das Bus: Bart, Lisa and their classmates fight to survive when they get stranded on a remote island after Otto drives the school bus off a bridge and into the sea.
(2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.
Standout moments from Series 6, when the celebs watched Bridgerton, MILF Manor, Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, and Donald Trump's victory in the 2024 US presidential election.
What do the Goggleboxers think of Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Apprentice, Go Back to Where You Came From, Michael McIntyre's Big Show and Boarders?
The Goggleboxers watch Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, and Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less.
Mum and daughter Maria and Charlotte visit the restaurant for the mother of all double dates. Academic Dan tries his 'intellectual' flirting technique with biologist Jemma.
Ted lost his beloved wife of 40 years three years ago. Now he's ready to return to the dating world. He meets Marian, who's been married four times but hasn't given up on love.
What do the Goggleboxers think of Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Apprentice, Go Back to Where You Came From, Michael McIntyre's Big Show and Boarders?
The Goggleboxers watch Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, and Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less.
Giuseppi's: Gordon Ramsay visits a family-owned Italian in Michigan, run by a father and son who constantly clash. Can he get the restaurant - and the family - back on track?
Handlebar: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.
It's a family's worst nightmare when two children are taken. Meanwhile, Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits.
(2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.
Sabatiello's: Gordon Ramsay sets his sights on Sabatiello's, an Italian restaurant in Connecticut that's better known for its owner Sammy's tantrums than the food.
Trobiano's: Gordon Ramsay meets struggling executive chef Anthony Trobiano, who's sinking under half a million dollars of debt at his restaurant in Great Neck, New York.
Brand new series: As Friends and Family Week comes to an end, new information comes to light that threatens the future of several couples.
Brand new series: At the fourth dinner party, one bride is determined to avoid any drama. Alas, a groom has heard some rumours and needs to confront her...
(2021) Charming Disney Pixar animated adventure about a cute sea monster with wanderlust who takes human form on dry land. He's not allowed to go near the surface but it's oh so tempting...
The Last Temptation of Krust: Krusty swaps his old routines for edgier material and becomes the hottest comic in showbusiness. But then he faces a dilemma.
Dumbbell Indemnity: Moe meets a new woman (guest star Helen Hunt) but maxes out his credit card trying to impress her. So he reverts to insurance fraud. With help from Homer...
Lisa the Simpson: Lisa starts to suspect that she's not as clever as she used to be and worries that she'll end up a permanent underachiever like her father.
Pray Anything: Jealous of Flanders' lifestyle, Homer starts to pray for material possessions, but things get out of hand when he asks for a bigger house and gets the church.
The Trouble with Trillions: Homer and Mr Burns go on the run to Cuba with a trillion-dollar note that Mr Burns was meant to deliver to post-war Europe.
Girly Edition: Lisa is made anchor of a children's news programme, but it's Bart's charisma that gets noticed, and the siblings start a battle - both on and off-air.
Brand new series: Crabbiness creeps in as the celebs push on without a break, in a day of hustle and heat. But as the teams fly to Penang, it's the end of the line for one pair...
Bart the Cool Kid: Homer buys Bart a counterfeit pair of the hottest new sneakers on the planet, making Bart extremely popular - until everyone finds out they're fake.
Pretty Whittle Liar: It turns out that Brandine Spuckler is a secret genius - something that Cletus just can't accept.
(1988) Action-thriller with Bruce Willis and Alan Rickman. Can a New York cop free the hostages being held in a skyscraper by an arch villain? Yippee ki-yay... whoops, can't say that here.
